notes: Condition must become symptomatic within 72 hours of service in the line of duty.

condition_specific: leukemia, lymphoma, multiple myeloma, bladder, brain, breast, colon, gastrointestinal tract, kidney, liver, lung, pancreas, reproductive system, skin, testicles, thyroid
filing_deadline_notes: Diagnosis must occur within 10 years of last active date of employment.
notes: Tobacco exclusion: no use within 10 years of diagnosis date. Age restriction: under 65 at diagnosis. Pre-employment exam per American Cancer Society recommendations; existing employees had until 2 years after July 1, 2007. Employer may rebut by preponderance of evidence that cancer was caused by non-service-connected risk factors.

filing_deadline_notes: Diagnosis must occur within 10 years of last active date of employment.
notes: Requires documented occupational exposure to aerosolized airborne agents. Tobacco exclusion: no use within 10 years of diagnosis. Vaccine refusal eliminates presumption unless medically contraindicated.

filing_deadline_notes: Diagnosis must occur within 10 years of last active date of employment.
notes: Statute covers 'rescue workers and ambulance squad members'; credential level not specified. Requires documented occupational exposure. Tobacco exclusion: no use within 10 years of diagnosis. Vaccine refusal eliminates presumption unless medically contraindicated.

condition_specific: infectious disease caused by aerosolized airborne infectious agents or blood-borne pathogens
filing_deadline_notes: Diagnosis must occur within 10 years of last active date of employment.
notes: Requires documented occupational exposure. Vaccine refusal eliminates presumption unless medically contraindicated. Covered in the same statutory section as lung disease.

condition_specific: infectious disease caused by aerosolized airborne infectious agents or blood-borne pathogens
filing_deadline_notes: Diagnosis must occur within 10 years of last active date of employment.
notes: Statute covers 'rescue workers and ambulance squad members'; credential level not specified. Requires documented occupational exposure. Vaccine refusal eliminates presumption unless medically contraindicated.

filing_deadline_notes: Diagnosis must occur within 3 years of last active date of employment.
notes: Must be diagnosed by a psychiatrist or psychologist. Employer may rebut by preponderance of evidence that PTSD was caused by non-service-connected risk factors.

filing_deadline_notes: Diagnosis must occur within 3 years of last active date of employment.
notes: Must be diagnosed by a psychiatrist or psychologist. Employer may rebut by preponderance of evidence that PTSD was caused by non-service-connected risk factors.

filing_deadline_notes: Diagnosis must occur within 3 years of last active date of employment.
notes: Statute covers 'rescue workers and ambulance workers.' Must be diagnosed by a psychiatrist or psychologist. Employer may rebut by preponderance of evidence that PTSD was caused by non-service-connected risk factors.
